title: Forever Speed Grass Trimmer Line 3mm*50m Round Steel Wire Universal Strimmer Wire 50m Replacement Trimmer Line Nylon Strimmer Cord Heavy Duty
features: Grass Trimmer Line: You will get a Round Steel Wire Grass Trimmer Line with a total length of approx. 50m (Dia. 3.0mm), which is a sufficient amount to spend the summer season with vigorous grass.

Line Size: The diameter of the Round Steel Wire weed eater string wire is 3.0mm, suitable for various styles of weed trimmer, lawn edger, and can effectively trim a variety of medium and long grass in small and medium-sized courtyard, outdoor, garden, or park.

Excellent Nylon Material: For the purpose of toughness, durability, and not easy to break, we have adopted a square composite nylon material with moderate hardness and integrated molding process to make this string trimmer replacement rope string line
Super Sharp: Steel Wire tendency to blend the threads. Low wear, very good cutting properties, long service life.

DIY Length: Although the effective working area of different styles of trimmers is different, this reinforced composite nylon mowing rope allows you to decide the length of use according to your needs. You only need to note the diameter 3.0mm of the nylon square rope to match trimmer.
